description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: build, deploy-api, and deploy-client, using the node:16 Docker image for the build-client-code job and python:latest for all other jobs. In the build stage add a build-client-code job that runs "apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq zip", then "cd aws-client/UnicornLambdaCode", "npm install", "zip -r ../UnicornLambdaCode.zip *", "cd ../..", and stores aws-client/UnicornLambdaCode.zip as a one‑day artifact; also add a create-s3 job that runs "pip install awscli" and then two "aws cloudformation deploy --template-file aws-unicorn/aws-client-s3.yml --stack-name ${AWS_S3_STACK_NAME} --no-fail-on-empty-changeset --region ca-central-1" and "aws cloudformation deploy --template-file aws-unicorn/aws-client-s3.yml --stack-name ${AWS_S3_STACK_NAME} --no-fail-on-empty-changeset --region us-east-1", which runs only on the master branch. In the deploy-api stage add a deploy-api job that runs "pip install awscli chalice", "cd aws-unicorn", "pip install -r requirements.txt", "chalice package --stage prod package/", "aws cloudformation package --template-file package/sam.json --s3-bucket ${AWS_S3_BUCKET_NAME} --s3-prefix chalice/${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}/ --force-upload --output-template-file cloud-formation-packaged.yml", "aws cloudformation deploy --template-file cloud-formation-packaged.yml --stack-name ${AWS_API_STACK_NAME} --capabilities CAPABILITY_IAM --no-fail-on-empty-changeset", "aws cloudformation describe-stacks --stack-name ${AWS_API_STACK_NAME} --query \"Stacks[].Outputs[?OutputKey=='EndpointURL'][] | [0].OutputValue\" --output text > endpoint-url.output", and "cat endpoint-url.output", publishing aws-unicorn/endpoint-url.output as an artifact. In the deploy-client stage add a deploy-client job that runs "pip install awscli", updates placeholders in aws-client/UnicornAccessRole.yml with four "sed -i -e \"s|{{...}}|${...}|g\"" commands, copies the client directory to S3 with "aws s3 cp aws-client s3://${AWS_S3_BUCKET_NAME}/${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG} --recursive --exclude UnicornLambdaCode/* --acl public-read", echoes ${AWS_TEMPLATE_URL}, defines an environment named ${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG} with on_stop clean-all, and a manual clean-all job (except master) that runs "aws s3 rm s3://${AWS_S3_BUCKET_NAME}/${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG} --recursive", "aws s3 rm s3://${AWS_S3_BUCKET_NAME}/chalice/${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG} --recursive", and "aws cloudformation delete-stack ${AWS_API_STACK_NAME}"; also add a deploy-client-us-east-1 job that runs only on master, sets AWS_DEFAULT_REGION to us-east-1, and performs the same sed and S3 copy steps.
